title: Are you attending Elevate '24 in person this year?

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Will we meet in person at Elevate '24??

In case you missed it, we are having a community lounge at Elevate this year! Imagine a space designed just for our community to unwind, connect, recharge, and celebrate!

I am super excited about meeting more of our community members iRL.

If you are attending Elevate '24 in person this year, let me know below so I can send you some details about our community lounge schedule! !

  • See you in London
  • Will be in NYC
  • Australia here I come
  • I will be watching online🧑‍💻
0 voters

More about our Elevate conferences here.

posts.author: Mindflows_Jesuena (Jesuena Estoque Reimer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes! We’re super excited!
Mindflows will be in NYC and Australia this year!
